review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI re-review verified validation_command_matrix_scope_inventory binds to RP00.P00.M07.S01, stays no-write scope-inventory only, includes all seven validation surfaces and commands, excludes generation commands, preserves H00/C00/no-real-data/human-approval boundaries, and does not claim full M07 or RP00 completion.

findings.title: Prior command-evidence H00 command_ids parity P3 is resolved
findings.details: hermes_gate.command_ids now lists product_contract_validate, rp00_control_plane_contract_validate, and spec_requirement_validate. All three are registered Hermes validation_commands and map to commands executed with exit_code 0.
findings.recommendation: No action required; treat the prior P3 as resolved.

findings.title: hermes_gate.command_ids parity is not machine-enforced by the validator
findings.details: The validator checks command-evidence status and command rows, but does not yet assert that hermes_gate.command_ids is a subset of hermes/project.json H00.validation_command_ids and maps to executed commands. Non-blocking for RP00.P00.M07.S01.
findings.recommendation: At RP00.P00.M07.S02, consider asserting that command-evidence hermes_gate.command_ids is a subset of H00.validation_command_ids and that each maps to an executed command with exit_code 0.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI re-review completed with PASS_WITH_FINDINGS and no P0/P1/P2 findings. The first C00 run found one P3 command-evidence H00 command_ids parity note; product_contract_validate was added and the final re-review confirmed that P3 is resolved. The remaining P3 validator-enforcement improvement is deferred to RP00.P00.M07.S02.
